title: Project Coordinator
description:
He/she is the person responsible for field operations. They are the assistant of the site / project engineers. They supervisor the work is constructed according to the site / project plans. They are also required to provide with possible and feasible solutions for any obstruction or problems that occur at the site / project.

-       Assist the Project Manager and Engineers in their duties.

-       Verifies implementation of solution to quality problems and liaise with subcontractor on drawings changes.

-       Monitor project progress and coordinate inspection and testing.

-       Conduct receiving inspections on goods and ensure they are properly carried out.

-       Brief the site staff and vendors on the environment, health, and safety policy (client and / or company), relevant procedures and other requirements of integrated management system (IMS)

-       Disseminate relevant information on the identified actual / potential significant environment, health and safety hazards and the relevant operational controls to the site staff.

-       Disseminate information relating to changes in the relevant environment, health and safety legislation and regulations to the site staff and management representative(s) of IMS.

-       Ensure that the design has taken into appropriate consideration on mitigating any significant environment, health and safety hazards and consequences associated with its installation, operation, maintenance, and shutdown.

-      Where required, carry out the appropriate monitoring and measurement to track activities and operations:

●       Compliance to the established environment, health, and safety policy.

●       Achievement of the established environment, health and safety objectives and targets.

●       Compliance to the applicable environment, health and safety legislation and regulations

●       Conformance to established operational control.

-      Ensure that appropriate emergency response plan (procedure) is in-place for the identified potential accident / emergency that includes (where applicable):

●       Periodic check on the emergency gears (e.g. chemical absorbent material, fire extinguisher, etc.) to ensure that they are serviceable.

●       Periodic trial run (simulated test) on the emergency procedure to review its suitability and, the awareness of the site staff on their roles and responsibilities in an emergency.

-      Ensure that appropriate corrective / preventive action is taken against the detected non-conforming activities / services at the site and, implement appropriate measures to mitigate any significant environment, health and safety hazards and consequences associated with the nonconformity.

postedCompany.description:
With 32 years of experience in the industry, we have undertaken a transformative journey, adapting to the dynamic demands of today's market. In pursuit of our commitment to continuous growth, we proudly established ADECOTECH Pte Ltd.


This strategic move empowers us to align with industry trends and significantly expand our service portfolio to comprehensively address our clients' diverse needs. Drawing from over a decade of experience in delivering exceptional interior projects of iconic stature prior to the inception of ADECOTECH, we are uniquely positioned to seamlessly integrate and coordinate both MEP and ID requirements, ensuring the highest standards of quality and functionality.


ADECOTECH understands the need to provide an integrated service to new developing projects and subsequent building maintenance after completion. Therefore, we are now a one-stop company specializing in 2 core main areas - Interiors, M&E works, Project Management, and Property Management to serve the developers from the construction to maintenance stages.


In Project Management, we consider the two significant aspects of a building – the Soul and the Appearance of the Building. The ‘Soul’ is where the comfort lies, and we can provide FULL M&E systems from design, supply, installation, and maintenance. The same goes for the Appearance of the building, which involves Architectural and interior works.


In Property Management, we provide facilities and estate management services, where we can undertake maintenance services contracts after project completion orto existing buildings where services are needed. ADECOTECH is actively participating in all sectors, especially in public and private tenders, concurrently expanding its business operations in Singapore and Overseas.


With the right strategies, the strong foundation built and with Management & Staff full commitment, leaders’ swift decision-making ability & close supervision, we can focus on achieving smooth running operations & on-time delivery.


We seek to fully understand our client’s requirements, deliver outstanding solutions, products, and services, exceeding their expectations. 


Agile:

We adapt with flexibility, always act responsively, resolve issues professionally and capture opportunities.


Collaborative:

We achieve more by working together and leveraging collective capabilities to achieve the desired client outcome. Progressive We lead the way in challenging the status quo, and in never giving up to find an innovative solution. Our People We are all accountable in creating an environment where the people are supported and empowered to grow and succeed.


We create a lasting environment that has a competitive

advantage in the market.
postedCompany.name: ADECOTECH PTE. LTD.
